stories.title: Busch receives tributes before, during Indy 500
stories.summary: Auto racing's biggest day became a Memorial Day weekend tribute to NASCAR racing great Kyle Busch from Indianapolis to Charlotte Motor Speedway.

stories.title: Rosenqvist wins closest Indianapolis 500 ever
stories.summary: Felix Rosenqvist of Sweden won the closest Indianapolis 500 ever in a one-lap shootout by a margin of 0.0233 seconds.

stories.title: SGA, Jokic, Wembanyama headline All-NBA teams
stories.summary: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander of Oklahoma City and Nikola Jokic of Denver were unanimous first-team All-NBA selections, while San Antonio's Victor Wembanyama missed joining them in that club by one vote.

stories.title: Messi exit overshadows Miami win, record half
stories.summary: Lionel Messi left the field in the 72nd minute of Inter Miami's 6-4 win over the Philadelphia Union at Nu Stadium on Sunday night, heading straight into the locker room after grabbing his left thigh.

stories.title: Clark cards 60, finishes 30 under for Nelson win
stories.summary: Wyndham Clark shot 11-under 60 to win the CJ Cup Byron Nelson, overtaking Si Woo Kim by three strokes and pulling away from defending champion Scottie Scheffler.
